questionHtml: Using the data, deduce whether pretreatment with ultrasound is effective for hydrolysing proteins.
markschemeHtml:
it is not, as hydrolysis is higher without ultrasound pretreatment
OR
it is not, as hydrolysis is lower with ultrasound pretreatment;

Do not accept numerical values only with no attempt to evaluate their importance.

Do not accept increase/decrease instead of lower/higher.

meta.title: Using the data, deduce whether pretreatment with ultrasound is effective for hydrolysing proteins.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
